title: ilex krugiana var. paciportensis
intro: Ilex krugiana var. paciportensis, also known as the Philippine holly, is a rare and endemic species of holly tree native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antidiarrheal and anti-inflammatory agent, due to its high content of ilicin, a flavonoid compound with potential health benefits. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Ilex krugiana var. paciportensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
